rooms.name: Echoing Caverns
rooms.description: A vast underground chamber filled with the whispers of ancient songs. Exits: 'north', 'east'.

rooms.name: Raven's Spire
rooms.description: A twisted, black tree rises to support a delicate stone spire. Exits: 'west', 'north'.

rooms.name: Shattered Peaks
rooms.description: Magma flows from rent earth like lifeblood from mortal wounds. Exits: 'south', 'east', 'north'.

rooms.name: Moonlit Grotto
rooms.description: An underwater cavern lit by an ethereal glow emanates from hidden crystals. Exits: 'west', 'south', 'north'.

rooms.name: Ghostfire Tower
rooms.description: A burning tower stands amidst a sea of dark, motionless trees. Exits: 'south', 'east'.

rooms.name: Blackstone Bridge
rooms.description: A rickety bridge suspended over a churning river fuels the whispers of doom. Exits: 'south', 'west', 'east'.

rooms.name: Voidstone Dagger
rooms.description: A blade that drinks light and whispers of forgotten names. Exits: 'west'.

items.name: Flask of Moonfire
items.description: Liquid starlight swirls within; one sip mends shattered flesh.

items.name: Gravewarden Shield
items.description: A shield etched with the names of every warrior who ever carried it.

items.name: Mira the Undying
items.description: A pale merchant who sells only by candlelight and never blinks.

items.name: Grask the Bone-Render
items.description: A skeleton animated by dark sorcery, its joints wrapped in rusted chain.

items.name: Elara of the Mire
items.description: A swamp-witch whose eyes hold centuries of cold, patient malice.

items.name: Bane of the Bone-Render
items.description: Steal the Voidstone Dagger from Grask's lair in Raven's Spire.

npcs.name: Curse of the Mire
npcs.description: Deliver the Flask of Moonfire to Elara in Ghostfire Tower.

npcs.name: Moonlit Heist
npcs.description: Retrieve the Gravewarden Shield from Shattered Peaks.

npcs.name: Vicious Goblin
npcs.description: A green-skinned monster holding a jagged dagger, drooling with malicious glee.

npcs.name: Old Wizard
npcs.description: An ancient sorcerer wearing a moth-eaten pointed hat, surrounded by floating books.
npcs.dialogue: Ah, a visitor! My enchanted wand was stolen by that wretched goblin. Bring it back and I shall grant you passage to the dungeon.

npcs.name: Skeleton Warrior
npcs.description: A rattling skeleton gripping a rusty sword, its empty eye sockets glowing faintly red.

npcs.name: Ghost King
npcs.description: A translucent figure sitting on the throne, radiating an aura of cold sorrow.
npcs.dialogue: Return my ancient crown to me, mortal... and I shall release the curse upon this land.

quests.name: Goblin Hunt
quests.description: The villager begs you to defeat the vicious goblin terrorizing the Dark Forest. A reward awaits!

quests.name: The Lost Crown
quests.description: The Ghost King haunts the throne room, longing for his Ancient Crown. Find it in the throne room and bring it to him.

quests.name: The Wizard's Lost Wand
quests.description: The Old Wizard's enchanted wand ended up in the Dark Forest. Retrieve it and return it to the Wizard.

player.name: Hurin
player.description: A brave young warrior with a sharp mind and sharper blade.
